title: Pentagon Stays Mum on School Strike, Even as Trump Boasts of Iran Rescue
summary_full: President Trump and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth’s eagerness to recount details of the rescue of a downed airman followed weeks of silence on the deadly Tomahawk missile strike on an Iranian school.
summary_public: President Trump and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth’s eagerness to recount details of the rescue of a downed airman followed weeks of silence on the deadly Tomahawk missile strike on an Iranian school.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Pentagon Stays Mum on School Strike
